web_search_query: LLM hallucination what it is why it happens mechanism 2024 2025

resources.notes: Peer-reviewed paper: Hallucination is Inevitable — An Innate Limitation of Large Language Models. Explains structural/mathematical basis of why hallucination cannot be eliminated from LLMs.
Lakera 2026 practitioner guide: causes of hallucination (token prediction, training data gaps, RLHF incentives) and mitigation approaches.
Catalog of real-world hallucination examples by category — legal citations, factual errors, fabricated references — with explanations of why each type occurs.
